frame_criteria.stopping_rule: strict integer; an exposure is accepted only when its pre-exposure image meets the SNR criterion and its post-exposure state remains within the condensate-loss limit

range_rationale.detuning: 0.75-3.0 GHz retains the reference 1.5 GHz line, covers the detuning range used for the principal screening comparison, and avoids extending the figure into a high-detuning region that would require fluences beyond the displayed experimental range.
range_rationale.fluence: 90-300 mW us brackets the A, B and C conditions of Figure 5.1, including the high-SNR reference at 300 mW us, and retains the intermediate sequence-length maximum.
range_rationale.quality: SNR_5x5 >= 8 is the task-specific spatial-structure criterion motivated by the regenerated ORCA-Fusion Figure 5.1; it is a screening requirement, not a universal visibility threshold.

scope.detector: ORCA-Fusion C14440-20UP Ultra quiet screening scenario with M=10, QE=0.65 and manufacturer-typical sigma_r=0.7 e- rms per physical pixel and readout
scope.disturbance: Version 1 heating plus initial-density reabsorption with 2 E_rec per scattering cycle
scope.faraday: ideal atomic response uses kappa_F=-45/91; apparatus-level polarimetric response remains to be calibrated
